decision.thesis: ETH oversold-squeeze long: RSI 31.35 dipte + negatif funding (-9.4e-06 = kalabalik short = squeeze yakiti long lehine) + 15m range = dusus ivmesi durdu (MACDh -1.66 cuce). 1d down counter-trend ama psikomanyak squeeze kovalar.
decision.detailed_rationale: Snapshot: ETH 1567.8, RSI 31.35, ATR 80.14, funding -9.4e-06. Stop 1536.4 (~2% = ~0.4 ATR), target 1654.0 (~5.5% = ~1.07 ATR) -> ~2.7:1 R:R. 14x kaldirac (likidasyon riskini kucakla). HYPE elendi (tum-TF range, momentum yok); BTC/XRP zaten D'de tutuluyor (ayni oversold-squeeze tezi). NOT: D kolu 2/2 dolu (BTC+XRP long, ikisi de su altinda, BTC 59506 stop 59244'e yakin); bu aday ancak path-check BTC/XRP'yi kapatip slot acarsa acilir.
